_comment: Scraper connection details per source group. Credentials here are public (Power BI Embedded resource keys). Per-hospital registry lives in hospitals.csv.

vahi_benchmarks._comment: System-wide and per-hospital VAHI 90th percentile (all ED categories). Quarter: Oct–Dec 2025. p90_all_mins = max across all hospitals (Box Hill 89m). Update each VAHI cycle alongside vahi_history_merged.csv.

monash_health._max_wait_audit: KNOWN DISCREPANCY (2026-04-28): Estimated Time for group_target=Adult gives a wait range (e.g. '2hr 46m - 6hr 50m'). The browser dashboard shows 8hr 51m for some campuses. This higher figure likely comes from (a) a separate 'Max Wait' visual querying all patients (not Adult-only), or (b) Paediatric patients included in an All-patients row. To investigate: in DevTools Network tab, filter POST /querydata after page load and inspect any SemanticQueryDataShapeCommand for a measure named MaxWait, LongestWait, or similar. A second query with group_target=All (removing the Where clause entirely) would capture the true ceiling.
